# Nano Machine Manga — nanomachinemanga.online

## About
Nano Machine Manga is a fan reading platform dedicated to the manhwa series "Nano Machine" (나노마신) by Hanjung Wolya. The site provides free access to high-quality English scans of all available chapters.

## Manga Info
- Title: Nano Machine
- Alternative Titles: 나노마신, Nanomachine, Nano Mashin
- Author: Hanjung Wolya
- Artist: Geum Gangsa
- Publisher: Naver Webtoon
- Serialization Start: January 31, 2020
- Status: Completed
- Genre: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Wuxia, Manhwa
- Synopsis: Cheon Yeo-Woon, an illegitimate orphan of the Demonic Cult's leader, receives a nano machine from a future descendant. The nano machine gives him superhuman martial arts abilities, allowing him to rise through the deadly ranks of the Demonic Cult.

## Key Characters
- Cheon Yeo-Woon — protagonist, nano machine host
- Mun Ku — ally and love interest
- Yeowun's father — the Lord of the Demonic Cult

## Site Pages
- Homepage: https://nanomachinemanga.online/
- All Chapters: https://nanomachinemanga.online/manga
- Chapter Reader: https://nanomachinemanga.online/chapter/{number}
- Characters: https://nanomachinemanga.online/characters
- About: https://nanomachinemanga.online/about

## Contact
Email: support@nanomachinemanga.online

## Disclaimer
This is a fan project. Not affiliated with Hanjung Wolya, Naver, or any official publisher. All manga content belongs to their respective copyright owners.
